evidence_summary: Establish the setting, the stakes (the gold vein), and the inciting incident (Powell's departure).
In the Arizona mountains, 1865, John Carter and James Powell discover a massive gold-bearing quartz vein. Powell decides to leave to secure machinery, leaving Carter alone to guard the claim.
Wide establishing shots of the landscape
Medium two-shots of Carter and Powell discussing plans.
